ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Sentiment polarity score of the tweet */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the tweet */,
  "clean_text" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the tweet after preprocessing */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or platform from which the tweet was collected */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* A label indicating the sentiment */,
  "topic_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or phrases relevant to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Specific access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Coronavirus, Climate Change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated topic */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the tweet to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "polarity_score" REAL /* Polarity score of the tweet */,
  "subjectivity_score" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the tweet */,
  "emotion" TEXT /* Emotion detected in the tweet */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes received */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was seen */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated as (likes + retweets + replies) / impressions */,
  "engagement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the engagement metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the hashtag in the dataset */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score associated with the hashtag */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the hashtag based on usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the tweet */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_images_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL shared in the tweet */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the URL */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the link */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_links_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets analyzed */,
  "average_likes" REAL /* Average number of likes across analyzed tweets */,
  "average_retweets" REAL /* Average number of retweets across analyzed tweets */,
  "average_replies" REAL /* Average number of replies across analyzed tweets */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the analysis period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the analysis period */,
  "top_topics" TEXT /* Top topics identified in the analysis */,
  "top_hashtags" TEXT /* Top hashtags identified in the analysis */,
  "trending_keywords" TEXT /* Trending keywords identified in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tweet data */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
